title: Power cuts scheduled for 22nd & 23rd
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The Chairman of the Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka Janaka Ratnayake has approved power cuts for the 22nd and 23rd of June as follows;
Groups A,B,C,D,E,F,G,H,I,J,K,L,P,Q,R,S,T,U,V,W – 2-Hours & 30-Minutes from 12 noon to 10.00 PM
Appeal Court rejects Johnston’s petition seeking to prevent his arrest
